overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene showing a character sitting on a rocky outcrop overlooking a vast natural landscape of rolling grasslands, forests, and distant mountains under a clear blue sky. The camera remains static in third-person perspective as the character observes the scenic wilderness while birds fly across the sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky cliff outcrop overlooking expansive grassland valley and distant mountains

events.description: character briefly raises right arm to shield eyes from sun or gesture toward the horizon
flock of birds flies across the sky from left to right in the distance

agents.ego_description: sitting on the edge of a rocky outcrop, calmly looking out over the vast landscape, occasionally raising a hand to shield their eyes from the sun

notable_agents.action: flock of birds flying across the sky in loose formation from left to right

entered.detail: large gray rock formation with rough texture where the character is seated
hazy blue mountain peaks visible on the horizon beneath scattered clouds
dense green tree cover covering the rolling hills in the mid-ground
expansive green prairie stretching between the outcrop and the distant tree line
fluffy white clouds scattered across the bright blue sky

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a static third-person view of a character sitting on a rocky outcrop overlooking a vast, sunlit wilderness. The landscape features rolling green grasslands, dense forest canopies, and distant hazy mountains under a clear blue sky with scattered clouds. The character remains seated and observant throughout, briefly raising an arm around the 3-second mark, while a flock of birds flies across the distant sky around 12 seconds, adding subtle life to the serene natural environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static third-person perspective of a character observing a vast, sunlit wilderness that remains serene and unchanging. It begins with the character seated on a rocky outcrop, overlooking a sprawling expanse of rolling green grasslands and dense forest canopies. As the character remains observant, they briefly raise an arm while gazing toward the distant, hazy mountains under a clear blue sky. The scene then subtly shifts in energy as a flock of birds glides across the horizon, adding a sense of movement to the still, natural environment.
